description: Letter by a man to his friend inquiring about the cessation of correspondence and emphasizing that 'brothers' may sometimes be angry with each other, but that the one who feels hurt must speak out, lest the other suspect him of some different motive. Handwriting of Berakhot b. Shemuel (active early 13th century). Verso is a very elaborate address. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, V, p. 205)
description_he: מכתב מאיש לחברו בנוגע לניתוק התכתבות, ומדגיש שאחים יכולים לכעוס זה על זה אך הנפגע חייב לדבר. בכתב ידו של ברכות ב' שמואל (פעיל מתחילת המאה ה-13).
